title: Chapter 141
content:
Chapter 141

Life is full of surprises.

Sometimes good, sometimes bad.

But one thing was for sure…

Life is beautiful.

Yeah, I feel like a hypocrite.

Alas, the orders hadn’t been fulfilled yet. I returned to still find some movers and some guards patrolling around.

But it was alright. It was just for the night. Tomorrow would be a good day.

Today was a good day. It was a day of joy. And just when I thought the day couldn’t get any better.

That’s right. It was Zara.

And she, too, was naked!

But that wasn’t the important detail about her. No, unlike my mother, she wasn’t in the chair. She was on the floor. Kneeling in front of the chair.

No, to be more precise, she was kneeling between my mother’s legs.

What was she doing, you ask?
